action.title: 🎮 Daily Playtest — {date}
action.body: Play the latest build for 5 minutes. Report: what works, what's broken, what feels off.

action.title: 📋 Weekly Retro — Week of {date}
action.body: What shipped this week? What blocked? What should change? What's the plan for next week?

action.title: 🧹 Backlog Grooming — {date}
action.body: Review all open issues older than 14 days. Close stale ones, re-prioritize active ones.
